2168760.name: Attic Panic
2168760.description:
Get ready to enter a world of madness and mayhem in Attic Panic, a thrilling online party shooter with rogue-like elements.

In this top-down shooter, every round presents you with a wicked assortment of randomized upgrade cards, ensuring a heart-pounding experience that will keep you hooked. Whether you crave the thrill of shielding yourself from enemy fire, bouncing bullets off walls, or unleashing a storm of otherworldly destruction upon your foes, Attic Panic offers a playstyle for everyone!

Play as a possessed toy, controlled by the sinister Lovecraftian beast "The Entity", and battle for supremacy in the dusty confines of a suburban attic. Armed with a devastating arsenal of weapons and abilities, you'll engage in intense shootouts, gathering upgrade cards and unlocking unique powers as you strive to become the most powerful follower of "The Entity".

Summon up to three of your fearless friends and plunge headfirst into the abyss of madness today. With it's free-to-play model and addictive gameplay, Attic Panic stands as an indispensable addition to any collection of party games. So, heed the call and prove your worth to "The Entity" today. Join the battle, for the hour of reckoning is upon us!
2168760.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
